task_completion.description: The order_lines dataset is imported into Oracle Analytics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'order_lines' listed in the Data Elements pane on the left side of the Oracle Analytics interface.

task_completion.description: A calculated column named 'Revenue_Per_Line' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Revenue_Per_Line' listed under 'My Calculations' or within the Data Elements pane.

task_completion.description: The 'Priority Breakdown' canvas analyzes total Sales by Order Priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a canvas tab named 'Priority Breakdown' at the bottom. The active canvas should display a chart or table containing 'Sales' and 'Order Priority' as the primary data elements.

task_completion.description: The 'Priority Profitability' canvas analyzes total Profit and average Revenue_Per_Line by Order Priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a canvas tab named 'Priority Profitability'. The active canvas should display a visualization containing 'Profit', 'Revenue_Per_Line' (with an aggregation of Average), and 'Order Priority'.

task_completion.description: A calculated column named 'Fulfillment_Margin' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Fulfillment_Margin' listed under 'My Calculations' or within the Data Elements pane.

task_completion.description: The 'Container Fulfillment' canvas analyzes total Shipping Cost and total Sales by Product Container type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a canvas tab named 'Container Fulfillment'. The active canvas should display a visualization containing 'Shipping Cost', 'Sales', and 'Product Container'.

task_completion.description: The workbook is saved as 'fulfillment_analytics.dva' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Oracle Analytics window title showing 'fulfillment_analytics' or a File Explorer window showing 'fulfillment_analytics.dva' inside the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics GUI to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface being interacted with, rather than a terminal or text editor generating the .dva file.

integrity.description: The visualizations are genuinely rendered by the BI tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts and tables should be native Oracle Analytics components, not mocked up images, HTML pages, or manually drawn shapes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the BI tool workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of Python scripts, PowerShell commands, or other programmatic shortcuts used to create the calculations or canvases outside of the Oracle Analytics UI.
